name: AXIS BANK PRIVILEGE Credit Card

milestones.label: 10,000 bonus EDGE REWARD Points on spending Rs 2.5 lakh in a card anniversary year

milestoneBenefits: 10,000 EDGE REWARD Points worth Rs 2,000 on spending Rs 2.5 lakh in a card anniversary year
Annual fee reversed on spends of Rs 5 lakh in the previous card anniversary year
additionalBenefits: 12,500 EDGE REWARD Points worth Rs 2,500 redeemable against vouchers after joining fee levy and first transaction within 30 days
Buy one get one movie ticket offer on District app, capped at Rs 250 once per month
2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per calendar quarter, subject to Rs 50,000 spends in the previous 3 months
1% fuel surcharge refund on fuel transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per statement cycle
Purchase protection cover up to Rs 1 lakh
Credit shield cover of Rs 1 lakh
Travel inconvenience covers for loss of travel documents, baggage delay and loss of check-in baggage

salaried: Minimum Net Monthly Salary: Rs 50,000 (Rs 6,00,000 per annum)
